---
title: "Contributors"
---

Thank you to all of the generous researchers who have contributed data to
Wordbank! The contributor list below is generated at every site build from
the [datasets table](https://redivis.com/datapages/datasets/wordbank) of the
Wordbank Redivis dataset (built `r format(Sys.Date())`), so it always
reflects the current data release.

1. Researchers publishing or presenting work using data in the Wordbank
   database must cite the publications linked to that dataset, as shown below
   in the contributors list. (If there is no linked citation, then no citation
   for the individual dataset is necessary.)
2. For tracking use of the database and its affiliated tools, please also
   cite: Frank, M. C., Braginsky, M., Yurovsky, D., & Marchman, V. A. (2017).
   Wordbank: An open repository for developmental vocabulary data.
   *Journal of Child Language.* doi: 10.1017/S0305000916000209
3. If researchers use more than five datasets, we ask users as a courtesy to
   cite all data. But in case of severe space limitations, the database as a
   whole may be cited.
4. Since the site contains many unpublished English datasets, users of the
   full English dataset need only cite the Wordbank database. Users of the
   normative English data should cite Fenson et al. (2007).
5. Some datasets are marked ![CC BY-NC](images/ccbync.large.png){width=25px}:
   these are licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0
   License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/) and may not be
   used for commercial purposes.
6. Wordbank data are versioned on Redivis; please report the dataset version
   (or download date) in your manuscript.

To contribute your data, please email
[wordbank-contact@stanford.edu](mailto:wordbank-contact@stanford.edu).
Use of Wordbank data for the development of new CDI instruments must be
approved by the CDI Advisory Board — see the Adaptations Guidelines on the
[CDI website](https://mb-cdi.stanford.edu/adaptations.html).

{{< include _load-datasets.qmd >}}

```{ojs contributors-cards}
{
  const ds = transpose(datasets);
  const langs = [...new Set(ds.map((d) => d.language))].sort();
  const cards = langs.map((lang) => {
    const rows = ds.filter((d) => d.language === lang)
      .sort((a, b) => (a.contributor || "").localeCompare(b.contributor || ""));
    return html`<div class="contrib-card">
      <div class="contrib-heading">${lang}</div>
      <ul>
        ${rows.map((d) => html`<li>
          <span class="contrib-name">${d.contributor || d.dataset_name}</span>
          <span class="badge-form">${d.form}</span>
          <span class="badge-n">${d.n_admins.toLocaleString()}</span>
          ${d.license === "CC-BY-NC" ? html`<a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/"><img src="images/ccbync.large.png" style="width:28px;vertical-align:middle"></a>` : ""}
          ${d.citation ? html`<div class="contrib-citation">${d.citation}</div>` : ""}
        </li>`)}
      </ul>
    </div>`;
  });
  return html`<div class="contrib-columns">${cards}</div>`;
}
```
